name: Momo Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the ghee in a pot.
2. Add ginger, garlic, and onion; stir-fry for 1 minute.
3. Add garam masala, turmeric, and chili powder; stir-fry for 30 seconds.
4. Add diced tomatoes and stir-fry for 3 minutes.
5. Pour in water and bring to a boil.
6. Reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes.
7. Stir in white vinegar, soy sauce, salt, and pepper.
8. Mix well and garnish with chopped green onions and cilantro.
9. Serve hot.
